rulings.Case Title: VAPORE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ALLPORTS LLC INTERNATIONAL, AN IDAHO LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder'S Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 14, 2007, LINE 12. DEFENDANTS YOUNG FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AND ALICE YOUNG'S Joinder TO Petition To Compel Arbitration IS DENIED. THE ARBITRATION PROVISION DOES NOT RELATE TO PLAINTIFF'S THREE CAUSES OF ACTION AT THIS POINT. IT MAY BE THAT AFTER THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS RESOLVED THAT THERE WOULD BE A BASIS FOR INVOKING THE ARBITRATION PROVISION AND THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DO SO UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2 =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: VAPORE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ALLPORTS LLC INTERNATIONAL, AN IDAHO LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb; Petition
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 14, 2007, LINE 12. DEFENDANT ALLPORTS, L.L.C., INTERNATIONAL'S Petition To Compel ARBITRATION IS DENIED. THE ARBITRATION PROVISION DOES NOT RELATE TO PLAINTIFF'S THREE CAUSES OF ACTION AT THIS POINT. IT MAY BE THAT AFTER THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS RESOLVED THAT THERE WOULD BE A BASIS FOR INVOKING THE ARBITRATION PROVISION AND THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DO SO UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2 =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: IAN JENSEN et al VS. MARIE DUGGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 14, 2007, LINE 13. PLAINTIFFS IAN JENSEN, DAVID SULLIVAN, TSERING GURUNG, JEREMY FORBING, DOES 1-10 AND ALLISA DAVIDOVICH'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST, 8TH AND 11TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. SUSTAINED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS THE FOLLOWING DEFICIENCIES: - 2ND DEFENSE: IDENTIFY APPLICABLE PROVISIONS OF THE RENT CODE - 3RD, 4TH, 5TH, 9TH, 10TH, 12TH, 13TH AND 14TH DEFENSES: SET FORTH FACTS THAT DESCRIBE THE BASIS FOR THE DEFENSE; AND - 6TH DEFENSE: IDENTIFY THE APPLICABLE CODE PROVISION =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENE ` TOM VS. THOMAS E ELLERBY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 14, 2007, LINE 15. DEFENDANT THOMAS ELLERBY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THE GROUNDS FOR EVICTION AND APPLICABLE FACTS; COMPLIANCE WITH THE RENT ORDINANCE IN PARAGRAPH 6; AND ATTACHMENT "A" DESCRIBES THE FACTS ESTABLISHING THE ALLEGED NUISANCE. HEARING REQUIRED ON THE TIME TO ANSWER. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENE ` TOM VS. THOMAS E ELLERBY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 14, 2007, LINE 15. DEFENDANT THOMAS ELLERBY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE VERIFICATION COMPLIES WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 446, THE NOTICES SET FORTH FACTS THAT FORM THE BASIS FOR THE EVICTION AND THE ALLEGATIONS OF SERVICE MAY BE REDUNDANT BUT ARE NOT IRRELEVANT. =(302/PJM/AP)
